subcodes.first_line: A Tablet hath indeed been revealed unto thee aforetime, and We sent it through the hand of Salman, that thou mayest be mindful of the remembrance of God, the All-Powerful [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد نزل لک لوحا من قبل و ارسلناه بید السلمان لتکون متذکرا بذکر الله المقتدر
subcodes.subjects: @chastisement and requital, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
